productDisplayName: Nike Men Football Soccer Navy Blue Jacket
description: Composition Navy blue hooded reversible jacket made of 100% polyester, has a hood and mock neck with a full front zipper, quilted look, two zippered pockets on the sides and heat transfer of Arsenal on the left chest and brand swoosh on the right chest. Navy blue and light blue on the reverse side, has a hood and mock neck, two press buttoned closure pockets on the sides, a zippered pocket on the left chest and heat transfer of Arsenal logo on the left chest with brand swoosh on the right chest Fitting Regular Gentle machine wash separately using cold water Do not bleach, dry clean or use softners Tumble dry low Cool iron; Do not iron on decorations Versatile and wearable on both sides for a look that's ready to face the great outdoors, this reversible padded jacket from nike brings performance wear into the 21st century in style. The quilted look adds oodles of style, while the soft polyester fabric keeps you warm and comfy. Layer it over a full sleeved T-shirt and jeans with sneakers to face any weather. Model statistics Product is a size M of height 6', chest 39" shoulders 18"
